steps.title: Remove the sample from the alcohol...
steps.instruction: Remove the sample from the alcohol in which it was preserved and place it in a Petridish under the stereoscope.

steps.title: Place the cephalothorax and legs (called...
steps.instruction: Place the cephalothorax and legs (called from now on “the sample”) on a piece ofpaper towel to remove as much alcohol as possible from the sample.

steps.title: Remove the sample’s abdomen and discard...
steps.instruction: Remove the sample’s abdomen and discard it, leaving only the cephalothorax and legs.

steps.title: Leave the sample at room temperature...
steps.instruction: Leave the sample at room temperature for 5 minutes to allow any remaining alcohol toevaporate.

steps.title: Transfer the sample to a pre-chilled...
steps.instruction: Transfer the sample to a pre-chilled (with liquid nitrogen for 15 seconds) 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Add approximately 1 mL Liquid nitrogen...
steps.instruction: Add approximately 1 mL Liquid nitrogen Contributed by users to freeze the sample completely.

steps.title: Ground the sample into small pieces...
steps.instruction: Ground the sample into small pieces (< 1 mm) or a fine powder using a plastic pestle.

steps.title: Add 500 µL CTAB buffer ( 2 % volume CTAB
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL CTAB buffer ( 2 % volume CTAB: 100 millimolar (mM) 1.4 Molarity (M) Sodium Chloride Contributed by users Catalog #PubChem CID:5234 , 20 millimolar (mM) EDTA disodium dihydrate Abblis Catalog #AB1011793 , 2 Mass / % volume CTAB Contributed by users , 2 % (v/v) Polyvinylpyrrolidone (PVP-40) Bio Basic Inc. Catalog #PB0436.SIZE.250g )

steps.title: Add 20 µL of Proteinase K...
steps.instruction: Add 20 µL of Proteinase K (20 mg/ml) Contributed by users

steps.title: Incubate Overnight at 55 °C with...
steps.instruction: Incubate Overnight at 55 °C with continuous shaking at 800 rpm.
1. Centrifuge samples 14000 rpm, Room temperature, 5 minutes

steps.title: Transfer 400 µL of the supernatant...
steps.instruction: Transfer 400 µL of the supernatant to a 2 mL tube.

steps.title: Add 400 µL of Chlorofom-octanol (24:1) Contributed by users
steps.instruction: Add 400 µL of Chlorofom-octanol (24:1) Contributed by users

steps.title: Repeat steps 22-25 at least once again
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 22-25 at least once again.

steps.title: Discard all the ethanol by decantation...
steps.instruction: Discard all the ethanol by decantation ensuring not to disturb the pellet (important: remove alcohol as much as you can).

steps.title: Centrifuge samples 14000 rpm, Room temperature, 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge samples 14000 rpm, Room temperature, 5 minutes

steps.title: Mix by vortex for 00:00:05
steps.instruction: Mix by vortex for 00:00:05 .

steps.title: Add 500 µL 70% Ethanol Contributed by users
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL 70% Ethanol Contributed by users .

steps.title: Discard all the supernatant ensuring not...
steps.instruction: Discard all the supernatant ensuring not to disturb the pellet (important: remove supernatant as much as you can).

steps.title: Centrifuge samples 14000 rpm, Room temperature, 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge samples 14000 rpm, Room temperature, 5 minutes

steps.title: Place the samples on ice and...
steps.instruction: Place the samples on ice and refrigerate at -20 °C for 01:00:00 (or overnight).

steps.title: Mix by inverting the tubes for 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Mix by inverting the tubes for 00:02:00 .

steps.title: Add 300 µL of Isopropanol Contributed...
steps.instruction: Add 300 µL of Isopropanol Contributed by users at -20 °C .

steps.title: Transfer 300 µL of the supernatant...
steps.instruction: Transfer 300 µL of the supernatant (without disturbing the organic phase) to a 1.5 mL tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge samples 14000 rpm, Room temperature, 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge samples 14000 rpm, Room temperature, 5 minutes

steps.title: Mix by inverting the tubes for 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Mix by inverting the tubes for 00:02:00

steps.title: Leave the tubes upside down on...
steps.instruction: Leave the tubes upside down on a napkin to remove excess ethanol for 02:00:00

steps.title: Once the pellet was completely dry,...
steps.instruction: Once the pellet was completely dry, it was eluted in 50 µL of TE Buffer Contributed by users .
